items.content:
About This Role

We are hiring a Professional Services Consultant to lead implementation projects for our enterprise customers. You will guide customers through platform setup, configuration, customization, and launch, ensuring they achieve time-to-value and long-term success with our product.

This role combines technical depth with consulting skills. You will work directly with customer teams, understand their business requirements, and translate them into effective platform configurations and integrations.

Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end implementation engagements for enterprise customers
  • Gather and document business and technical requirements
  • Configure and customize the platform to meet customer needs
  • Develop custom integrations using APIs and available extension points
  • Train customer administrators and content editors on platform usage
  • Create implementation documentation, runbooks, and best practice guides

Requirements

  • 3-5 years of experience in professional services, technical consulting, or solutions delivery
  • Hands-on experience with web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
  • Experience with CMS platforms, API integrations, or web development projects
  • Strong project management skills and ability to manage multiple concurrent engagements
  • Excellent client-facing communication and presentation skills

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Node.js and MongoDB
  • Familiarity with ApostropheCMS or similar open-source CMS platforms
  • PMP certification or Agile project management experience
